channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Business & Economic Policy
channel.description: Strictly Zimbabwe business, finance, mining, investment and economic-policy stories — curated from foreign press and policy press. Each item ships with a branded headline card for social autolists.

item.title: ZBC Upgrades to HD on DStv, Launches Z+ Streaming Platform
item.description: ZBC Upgrades to HD on DStv, Launches Z+ Streaming Platform The Zimbabwe Broadcasting Corporation (ZBC) has stepped up its digital transformation by introducing High Definition (HD) broadcasts on the DStv platform while preparing to officially launch its new Z+ streaming service. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Air Zimbabwe Announces London Return Date, Sets Promotional Prices @263Chat
item.description: The London route was once among Air Zimbabwe’s flagship international services, linking Zimbabwe directly with the United Kingdom, home to one of the country’s largest diaspora communities and an important source market for tourism, business travel and investment. The post Air Zi #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Farmers to pay for insurance premiums using crops
item.description: Elita Chikwati THE Zimbabwe Farmers Union, AFC Bank and Zep-Re (PTA Reinsurance Company) have rolled out Grain Premium Insurance, enabling farmers to pay premiums with maize, beans, sunflower and soyabeans... #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: IMF backs Zimbabwe reforms as economy remains resilient
item.description: IMF backs Zimbabwe reforms as economy remains resilient — via Channel Africa #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Channel Africa

item.title: Corporate Accountability and Human Rights of Transnational Companies in Zimbabwe’s Mineral Extractive Industries

item.title: Zimbabwe’s top critical mineral could be in focus as the US commits $300 million to detach from China
item.description: Zimbabwe’s top critical mineral could be in focus as the US commits $300 million to detach from China — via Business Insider Africa #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimbabwe records 42% growth in exports as value-added production expands
item.description: Zimbabwe records 42% growth in exports as value-added production expands — via TV BRICS #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: The Tech Stack Will Decide ZEEX. The ZSE Has Been Quietly Building Toward It
item.description: Whether Zimbabwe’s new SME exchange works will come down to the #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bradley Manyika

item.title: How a 42% reserve boost at one gold mine added $1 billion to Zimbabwe’s mining ambitions
